subcodes.first_line: O my kind friends! According to what is evident, that realm and region hath become perfumed with the fragrant musk of the Abhá Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یاران مهربانم از قرار معلوم آنمرز و بوم از رائحه جنت ابهی معطر گشته نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wisdom [hikmat]
